title: 7th Pay Commission & DA Arrears
description: Implement 7th Pay Commission recommendations for state employees and clear all pending Dearness Allowance arrears.

title: Annapurna Scheme — ₹3,000/month for Women
description: Monthly financial assistance of ₹3,000 to all eligible women in the state as promised under the Annapurna Scheme.

title: Uniform Civil Code (UCC) Legislation
description: Draft and pass Uniform Civil Code legislation in the West Bengal State Assembly.

title: Ayushman Bharat Rollout
description: Full statewide implementation of the Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana health insurance scheme.

title: BSF Border Fencing (Bangladesh Border)
description: Transfer land to BSF and complete fencing along the Bangladesh border to curb illegal infiltration.

title: Fill All State Dept Vacancies
description: Transparent recruitment to fill over 2 lakh vacant posts across state government departments by December 2026.

title: CBI Investigation into TMC Corruption
description: Refer all pending corruption cases from the TMC era to CBI for independent investigation.

title: Ghatal Master Plan (Flood Control)
description: Execute the long-pending Ghatal Master Plan to permanently solve flooding in Ghatal, Daspur, and Chandrakona.

title: Singur Industrial Park Revival
description: Restore and develop the Singur land as a state-of-the-art industrial park to attract investment.

title: Youth Employment Grant — ₹2,000/month
description: Monthly stipend of ₹2,000 for unemployed educated youth while they await government job placement.

title: Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita (BNS) Implementation
description: Fully implement the new criminal code — BNS, BNSS, and BSA — replacing the colonial-era IPC across WB.

title: White Paper Audit Release
description: Publish a comprehensive White Paper documenting 15 years of TMC misgovernance, corruption and financial irregularities.

title: SIT for SSC Recruitment Scam
description: Constitute a Special Investigation Team to probe the ₹40+ crore SSC/TET teacher recruitment scam.

title: PM Vishwakarma Yojana Rollout
description: Implement the PM Vishwakarma scheme to support artisans and craftspeople with credit and skill training.

title: State Census Exercise
description: Complete the long-pending state census, deferred since 2021, to update welfare beneficiary databases.
